bluetooth_confirm.description:
Add the discovered PetKit fountain {name} ({address})?

⚠ WARNING — irreversible: on first connect this integration sends a pairing command that overwrites the fountain's device secret. After this runs, the official PetKit app will no longer be able to control the fountain. There is no documented way to undo this without a factory reset. Only proceed if you intend to control the fountain through Home Assistant exclusively.

user.description:
Choose a discovered PetKit fountain to set up.

⚠ WARNING — irreversible: on first connect this integration sends a pairing command that overwrites the fountain's device secret. After this runs, the official PetKit app will no longer be able to control the fountain. There is no documented way to undo this without a factory reset. Only proceed if you intend to control the fountain through Home Assistant exclusively.

confirm_repair.title: Device Already Paired
confirm_repair.description: **{name}** is already paired — most likely with the PetKit app, or with a previous Home Assistant setup whose secret was lost. To control it from Home Assistant you must re-pair it with a new secret. This **overwrites the existing pairing**: the PetKit app won't connect until you factory reset the fountain, and the two can't control it at the same time.

abort.no_devices_found: No PetKit fountains found nearby. Ensure the fountain is powered and within Bluetooth range of Home Assistant.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the fountain over Bluetooth. Bring it closer to Home Assistant and try again.
abort.init_failed: Could not pair the fountain. Bring it closer and try again; if it keeps failing, power-cycle the fountain and re-add it.
abort.repair_failed: Could not re-pair the device. Bring it closer and try again; if it keeps failing, factory reset it (detach control module, hold power button 3 seconds until LEDs flash), then re-add it.
abort.repair_cancelled: Re-pairing cancelled. The device was left untouched.

init.description: Connection mode trades BLE adapter slot residency for update freshness. Persistent (default): one slot held continuously; the fountain's push channel delivers real-time state changes. On-demand: slot is freed between polls; updates only arrive at the poll interval. Lower the poll interval if you switch to on-demand.
